title: tree
content:
BST（二分搜索树）


/**
 * 二分搜索树
 */
public class BST<T extends Comparable<T>> {
    private class Node {
        public T t;
        public Node left, right;

        public Node(T t) {
            this.t = t;
        }
    }

    private Node root;
    private int size;

    public int size() {
        return size;
    }

    public boolean isEmpty() {
        return size == 0;
    }

    //向二分搜索树中添加元素
    public void add(T t) {
        root = add(root, t);
    }

    private Node add(Node node, T t) {
        if (node == null)//当前节点为空插入新节点
            return new Node(t);
        if (t.compareTo(node.t) < 0)//插入的值比当前的值小，往当前左子树中插入，左指针指向插入完成后的左子树
            node.left = add(node.left, t);
        else if (t.compareTo(node.t) > 0)//插入的值比当前节点的值大，往当前节点的右子树插入
            node.right = add(node.right, t);
        //相等情况不做处理
        return node;//返回插入完成后的根节点
    }

    //查询二叉搜索树中是否包含某个元素
    public boolean contains(T t) {
        return contains(root, t);
    }

    private boolean contains(Node node, T t) {
        if (node == null)
            return false;
        if (t.compareTo(node.t) < 0)//查询的值比当前的值小，返回其左子树中查询的结果
            return contains(node.left, t);
        else if (t.compareTo(node.t) > 0)//查询的值比当前的值大，返回其右子树中查询的结果
            return contains(node.right, t);
        else //找到查询的值
            return true;
    }

    //二叉搜索树前序遍历
    public void preOrder() {
        preOrder(root);
    }

    private void preOrder(Node node) {
        if (node == null)
            return;
        //前序遍历：根左右
        System.out.print(node.t + "->");
        preOrder(node.left);
        preOrder(node.right);
    }

    //前序遍历非递归,深度优先遍历使用栈结构
    public void preOrderNR() {
        Stack<Node> stack = new Stack<>();
        stack.push(root);
        while (!stack.isEmpty()) {//栈不为空，先后将右子树和左子树入栈
            Node cur = stack.pop();
            System.out.println(cur.t);
            if (cur.right != null)
                stack.push(cur.right);
            if (cur.left != null)
                stack.push(cur.left);

        }

    }

    //中序遍历：有序遍历，左根右
    public void inOrder() {
        inOrder(root);
    }

    private void inOrder(Node node) {
        if (node == null)
            return;
        inOrder(node.left);
        System.out.print(node.t + "->");
        inOrder(node.right);
    }

    //后序遍历：左右根
    public void postOrder() {
        postOrder(root);
    }

    private void postOrder(Node node) {
        if (node == null)
            return;
        postOrder(node.left);
        postOrder(node.right);
        System.out.print(node.t + "->");
    }

    //层序遍历，广度优先遍历使用队列
    public void levelOrder() {
        Queue<Node> queue = new LinkedList<>();
        queue.add(root);
        while (!queue.isEmpty()) {//队列不为空，左右子树先后入队
            Node cur = queue.remove();
            System.out.println(cur.t);
            if (cur.left != null)
                queue.add(cur.left);
            if (cur.right != null)
                queue.add(cur.right);
        }
    }

    //删除相关操作
    public T min() {
        return min(root).t;
    }

    private Node min(Node node) {
        if (node.left == null)
            return node;
        return min(node.left);
    }

    public T max() {
        return max(root).t;
    }

    private Node max(Node node) {
        if (node.right == null)
            return node;
        return max(node.right);
    }

    //删除最大值或最小值
    public T removeMin() {
        T ret = min();
        root = removeMin(root);
        return ret;
    }

    private Node removeMin(Node node) {
        //两种情况叶子结点或只有右子树
        if (node.left == null) {//找到最小节点
            Node rightNode = node.right;//记录右节点
            node.right = null;//删除节点
            size--;
            return rightNode;//返回右节点
        }
        //没有找到最小节点,继续向左删除
        node.left = removeMin(node.left);
        return node;//返回删除最小节点的根节点
    }

    public T removeMax() {
        T ret = max();
        root = removeMax(root);
        return ret;
    }

    private Node removeMax(Node node) {
        if (node.right == null) {
            Node leftNode = node.left;
            node.left = null;
            size--;
            return leftNode;
        }
        node.right = removeMax(node.right);
        return node;
    }

    //删除BST中的任意节点
    public void remove(T t) {
        root = remove(root, t);
    }

    //三种情况，当前删除节点只有右子树，只有左子树，左右子树都有
    private Node remove(Node node, T t) {
        if (node == null)//没有找到要删除的节点
            return null;
        if (t.compareTo(node.t) < 0) {
            //比当前节点小往左边查找要删除的元素
            node.left = remove(node.left, t);
            return node;//返回删除了元素的根节点
        } else if (t.compareTo(node.t) > 0) {
            //比当前节点大，往右边查找
            node.right = remove(node.right, t);
            return node;
        } else {//找到要删除元素，进行删除，三种情况
            //第一种只有左子树
            if (node.right == null) {
                Node leftNode = node.left;
                node.left = null;
                size--;
                return leftNode;
            }
            //只有右子树
            else if (node.left == null) {
                Node rightNode = node.right;
                node.right = null;
                size--;
                return rightNode;
            }
            //左右子树均有,有当前节点的有子树的最小节点替换当前节点的位置，删除最小节点
            else {
                Node successor = min(node.right);//获取右子树最小节点
                //不用维护size，removeMin已经维护了
                successor.right = removeMin(node.right);
                successor.left = node.left;
                node.left = node.right = null;
                return successor;//返回删除元素的根节点
            }
        }
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        BST<Integer> bst = new BST<>();
        for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
            bst.add(new Random().nextInt(100));
        }
        bst.inOrder();
        System.out.println();
        bst.remove(bst.max());
        bst.inOrder();
    }
}

AVLTree (平衡二叉树)

public class AVLTree<T extends Comparable<T>> {
    private class Node {
        public T val;
        public int height;
        public Node left;
        public Node right;

        public Node(T val, Node left, Node right) {
            this.val = val;
            this.left = left;
            this.right = right;
        }

        public Node(T data) {
            this(data, null, null);
        }

        public Node() {

        }
    }

    private Node root;
    private int size;

    public int getSize() {
        return size;
    }

    //添加元素
    public void add(T t) {
        root = add(root, t);
    }

    private Node add(Node node, T t) {
        if (node == null) {
            node = new Node(t);
            node.height = 1;
            size++;
        }
        if (node.val.compareTo(t) > 0) {
            node.left = add(node.left, t);
        } else if (node.val.compareTo(t) < 0) {
            node.right = add(node.right, t);
        } else {
            //重复不处理
        }
        //平衡二叉树维护
        //树的高度维护
        node.height = 1 + Math.max(getHeight(node.left), getHeight(node.right));
        int balancefactor = getBanlanceFactor(node);

        //LL 模式，在节点的左侧的左侧添加元素导致当前节点不平衡
        if (balancefactor > 1 && getBanlanceFactor(node.left) > 0)
            return rightRatato(node);
        //RR
        if (balancefactor < -1 && getBanlanceFactor(node.right) < 0)
            return leftRatato(node);
        //LR
        if (balancefactor > 1 && getBanlanceFactor(node.left) < 0) {
            node.left = leftRatato(node.left);
            return rightRatato(node);
        }
        //RL
        if (balancefactor < -1 && getBanlanceFactor(node.right) > 0) {
            node.right = rightRatato(node.right);
            return leftRatato(node);
        }
//        if (balancefactor != 0)
//            System.out.println("balancefactor:"+balancefactor);
        return node;
    }

    //右旋转并返回右旋转后的节点
    private Node rightRatato(Node node) {
        Node left = node.left;
        Node leftright = left.right;
        //旋转操作
        left.right = node;
        node.left = leftright;
        //维护高度,顺序不能反
        node.height = 1 + Math.max(getHeight(node.left), getHeight(node.right));
        left.height = 1 + Math.max(getHeight(left.left), getHeight(left.right));
        return left;
    }

    private Node leftRatato(Node node) {
        Node right = node.right;
        Node rightleft = right.left;
        //旋转操作
        right.left = node;
        node.right = rightleft;
        //高度更新
        node.height = 1 + Math.max(getHeight(node.left), getHeight(node.right));
        right.height = 1 + Math.max(getHeight(right.left), getHeight(right.right));
        return right;
    }

    //获取当前节点的高度
    private int getHeight(Node node) {
        //空节点为0，叶子节点高度为1
        if (node == null)
            return 0;
        return node.height;
    }

    //获取当前节点的平衡因子
    private int getBanlanceFactor(Node node) {
        if (node == null)
            return 0;
        //左子树高度减右子树高度
        return getHeight(node.left) - getHeight(node.right);
    }

    public boolean isBST() {
        List<T> list = inOrder();
        for (int i = 0; i < list.size() - 1; i++) {
            if (list.get(i).compareTo(list.get(i + 1)) > 0)
                return false;
        }
        return true;
    }

    public boolean isBalanced() {
        return isBalanced(root);
    }

    private boolean isBalanced(Node node) {
        if (node == null)
            return true;
        if (Math.abs(getBanlanceFactor(node)) > 1)
            return false;
        //左右子树都平衡才行。
        return isBalanced(node.left) && isBalanced(node.right);
    }

    public List<T> preOrder() {
        List<T> list = new ArrayList<>();
        preOrder(root, list);
        return list;
    }

    private void preOrder(Node node, List<T> list) {
        if (node == null)
            return;
        list.add(node.val);
        preOrder(node.left, list);
        preOrder(node.right, list);
    }

    public List<T> inOrder() {
        List<T> list = new ArrayList<>();
        inOrder(root, list);
        return list;
    }

    private void inOrder(Node node, List<T> list) {
        if (node == null)
            return;
        inOrder(node.left, list);
        list.add(node.val);
        inOrder(node.right, list);
    }

    public List<T> postOrder() {
        List<T> list = new ArrayList<>();
        postOrder(root, list);
        return list;
    }

    private void postOrder(Node node, List<T> list) {
        if (node == null)
            return;
        postOrder(node.left, list);
        postOrder(node.right, list);
        list.add(node.val);
    }

    public T min() {
        return min(root).val;
    }

    private Node min(Node node) {
        if (node == null)
            return null;
        if (node.left == null)
            return node;
        return min(node.left);
    }

    public T max() {
        return max(root);
    }

    private T max(Node node) {
        if (node == null)
            return null;
        if (node.right == null)
            return node.val;
        return max(node.right);
    }

    public T removeMin() {
        T min = min();
        root = removeMin(root);
        return min;
    }

    private Node removeMin(Node node) {
        if (node == null)
            return null;
        if (node.left == null) {
            Node right = node.right;
            node.right = null;
            size--;
            return right;
        }
        node.left = removeMin(node.left);
        return node;
    }

    //删除指定值
    public void remove(T t) {
        root = remove(root, t);
    }

    private Node remove(Node node, T t) {
        if (node == null)
            return null;
        Node retNode;//用于记录返回节点，对平衡进行处理
        if (node.val.compareTo(t) > 0) {
            node.left = remove(node.left, t);
            retNode = node;
        } else if (node.val.compareTo(t) < 0) {
            node.right = remove(node.right, t);
            retNode = node;
        } else {
            if (node.left == null) {
                Node right = node.right;
                node.right = null;
                size--;
                retNode = node;
            } else if (node.right == null) {
                Node left = node.left;
                node.left = null;
                size--;
                retNode = node;
            } else {
                Node successor = min(node.right);
                successor.right = remove(node.left, successor.val);
                successor.left = node.left;
                node.left = node.right = null;
                retNode = successor;
            }
        }
        retNode.height = 1 + Math.max(getHeight(retNode.left), getHeight(retNode.right));
        int balancefactor = getBanlanceFactor(retNode);

        //LL 模式，在节点的左侧的左侧添加元素导致当前节点不平衡
        if (balancefactor > 1 && getBanlanceFactor(retNode.left) > 0)
            return rightRatato(retNode);
        //RR
        if (balancefactor < -1 && getBanlanceFactor(retNode.right) < 0)
            return leftRatato(retNode);
        //LR
        if (balancefactor > 1 && getBanlanceFactor(retNode.left) < 0) {
            retNode.left = leftRatato(retNode.left);
            return rightRatato(retNode);
        }
        //RL
        if (balancefactor < -1 && getBanlanceFactor(retNode.right) > 0) {
            retNode.right = rightRatato(retNode.right);
            return leftRatato(retNode);
        }
        return retNode;
    }

}

SegmentTree (线段树)

//线段树，用于处理区间问题，每一个节点都是区间操作的结果
//使用数组实现
public class SegmentTree<T> {
    private T[] tree;//树结构，用于存储处理后的数据
    private T[] data;//用于存储区间数据
    private Merge<T> merge;

    public SegmentTree(T[] arr, Merge<T> merge) {
        //初始化操作
        data = (T[]) new Object[arr.length];
        tree = (T[]) new Object[4 * arr.length];//线段树中的节点数是区间的4倍
        for (int i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) {
            data[i] = arr[i];//保存区间数据的副本
        }
        this.merge = merge;
        //创建线段树
        createSegmentTree(0, 0, data.length - 1);
    }

    private void createSegmentTree(int treeIndex, int l, int r) {
        if (l == r) {//左右端点相等，到达叶子节点
            tree[treeIndex] = data[l];
            return;
        }
        int leftChild = leftChild(treeIndex);
        int rightChild = rightChild(treeIndex);
        int mid = l + (r - l) / 2;//区间分段
        //从下到上创建线段树
        //创建左子树
        createSegmentTree(leftChild, l, mid);
        //创建右子树
        createSegmentTree(rightChild, mid + 1, r);
        //左右孩子的结果汇总到根节点
        tree[treeIndex] = merge.merge(tree[leftChild], tree[rightChild]);

    }

    //获取左孩子索引
    private int leftChild(int treeIndex) {
        return 2 * treeIndex + 1;
    }

    //获取右孩子索引
    private int rightChild(int treeIndex) {
        return 2 * treeIndex + 2;
    }

    public int getSize() {
        return data.length;
    }

    //查询区间值
    public T query(int queryl, int queryr) {
        //边界检查
        if (queryl < 0 || queryl >= data.length || queryr < 0 || queryr >= data.length || queryl > queryr)
            throw new ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException("下标越界！");
        return query(0, 0, data.length - 1, queryl, queryr);
    }

    //递归查询区间值
    private T query(int treeIndex, int l, int r, int queryl, int queryr) {
        if (l == queryl && r == queryr)
            return tree[treeIndex];
        int leftChild = leftChild(treeIndex);
        int rightChild = rightChild(treeIndex);
        int mid = l + (r - l) / 2;//避免整型溢出
        //三种情况，在左子树，在右子树，左右子树都有
        //左子树
        if (queryr <= mid) {
            return query(leftChild, l, mid, queryl, queryr);
        } else if (queryl >= mid + 1) {
            return query(rightChild, mid + 1, r, queryl, queryr);
        } else {
            T resultl = query(leftChild, l, mid, queryl, mid);
            T resultr = query(rightChild, mid + 1, r, mid + 1, queryr);
            return merge.merge(resultl, resultl);
        }
    }

    public void set(int index, T t) {
        if (index < 0 || index >= data.length)
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("下标越界！");
        data[index] = t;
        set(0, 0, data.length - 1, index, t);
    }

    //index就是边界
    private void set(int treeIndex, int l, int r, int index, T t) {
        if (l == r) {
            tree[treeIndex] = t;
            return;
        }
        int leftTreeIndex = leftChild(treeIndex);
        int rightTreeIndex = rightChild(treeIndex);
        int mid = l + (r - l) / 2;
        if (index <= mid) {
            set(leftTreeIndex, l, mid, index, t);
        } else {
            set(rightTreeIndex, mid + 1, r, index, t);
        }
        //更新节点的父节点
        tree[treeIndex] = merge.merge(tree[leftTreeIndex], tree[rightTreeIndex]);
    }

    @Override
    public String toString() {
        StringBuilder stringBuilder = new StringBuilder("SegmentTree: ");
        for (int i = 0; i < tree.length; i++) {
            if (tree[i] != null) {
                stringBuilder.append(tree[i] + "->");
            }
        }
        return stringBuilder.toString();
    }
}

Trie（字典树）

//用于字符串中
public class Trie {
    private class Node {
        public boolean isWord;//判断是否是一个单词的结尾
        public TreeMap<Character, Node> next;//每一个节点映射到若干个节点

        public Node(boolean isWord) {
            this.isWord = isWord;
            next = new TreeMap<>();
        }

        public Node() {
            this(false);
        }
    }

    private Node root;//根节点
    private int size;//记录单词的个数

    public Trie() {
        root = new Node();
        size = 0;
    }

    public int getSize() {
        return size;
    }

    //添加一个单词
    public void add(String word) {
        Node cur = root;
        for (int i = 0; i < word.length(); i++) {
            char c = word.charAt(i);
            if (cur.next.get(c) == null)//如果当前节点的下一个节点不存在，则创建一个新节点
                cur.next.put(c, new Node());
            cur = cur.next.get(c);//走向下一个节点
        }
        if (!cur.isWord) {//不是一个单词设置成一个单词，避免找到的是前缀
            cur.isWord = true;
            size++;
        }
    }

    //判断一个单词是否存在
    public boolean contains(String word) {
        Node cur = root;
        for (int i = 0; i < word.length(); i++) {
            char c = word.charAt(i);//相当于存储在路径上的
            if (cur.next.get(c) == null)//字符串没有走完，就找不到节点表示没有这个节点
                return false;
            cur = cur.next.get(c);
        }
        return cur.isWord;//不能直接返回true，有可能是一个单词的前缀。
    }

}
